about.title: Farghal X
about.bio: I don't just talk about AI; I build it. Based in Kuala Lumpur, I specialize in architecting n8n workflows for clients globally. From automated WhatsApp responders to deep content generation pipelines, I replace busywork with logic.
about.markets_desc: We work remotely with clients worldwide.
about.cta_desc: Whether you need a custom knowledge base, a lead qualifying agent, or an entire content engine, I can build the backend to run it seamlessly.

services.value_ladder_title: Most clients start with one system and add more as they see results.
services.case_studies_title: As seen in our case studies
services.why_auto_desc: A custom AI system does the work — without the overhead.
why_auto_points: Works 24/7 — no breaks, no sick days, no holidays
Zero training time — deployed in 7-14 days
One-time investment, not a monthly salary
Scales instantly as your business grows
No HR, no onboarding, no management overhead

faqs.q: How long does it take to build?

faqs.a: No, we handle everything. You just use the output.
n8n, WhatsApp Cloud API, Claude AI, Google Workspace, Apify.

faqs.q: Can I customize the system later?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer monthly support packages (RM 500-1,500/month).

faqs.q: Do you work with companies outside Malaysia?
faqs.a: Yes, we serve clients in Southeast Asia, Middle East, Australia, and UK — all remote.

faqs.q: What if I'm not sure what I need?
faqs.a: Book a free diagnostic call. We'll audit your workflow and recommend the right system.

services.bottom_cta_desc: Book a free 15-minute diagnostic call. We'll find your biggest time-waster and show you how to automate it.

portfolio.page_desc: Detailed showcase of AI automation systems that transformed businesses and saved thousands in operational costs.

projects.title: AI Sales Research Agent
projects.problem: Sales teams waste hours researching clients manually. B2B SaaS company's 5-person sales team spent 2-3 hours per prospect researching company websites, LinkedIn profiles, and recent news.
projects.solution: Built an AI agent that summarizes LinkedIn + website insights in seconds with automated scraping, profile extraction, and personalized opening lines.

projects.title: WhatsApp CRM System
projects.problem: Car dealership overwhelmed with 80+ daily WhatsApp inquiries asking repetitive questions about availability, pricing, and test drives. 4+ hour response times caused lost leads.
projects.solution: Designed end-to-end WhatsApp CRM automation with AI intent recognition, automatic loan calculations, live inventory checks, and 24/7 instant responses.

projects.title: Balqiso Trade Inventory Tracker
projects.problem: Wholesale clothing business owner spent 15 hours/week manually tracking inventory across 3 supplier spreadsheets, leading to frequent stockouts and over-ordering.
projects.solution: Created all-in-one Google Sheets system with centralized dashboard, automatic profit calculations, reorder alerts, and real-time analytics.

projects.title: AI Content Research Pipeline
projects.problem: Content team was spending 10+ hours each week manually researching LinkedIn trends, tracking viral posts, and building content strategy documents from scratch.
projects.solution: Scrapes LinkedIn posts from top creators, searches trending keywords, runs AI analysis, and outputs a 6-tab content strategy spreadsheet — all automated.

projects.title: AI Cold Outreach System
projects.problem: Sales team was sending generic cold emails with low reply rates, spending hours manually researching each lead and writing individual icebreakers.
projects.solution: Finds leads, researches each company with AI, generates personalized icebreaker emails, and sends 3-email sequences via custom domain — zero manual work.

projects.title: AI Executive Assistant
projects.problem: Busy exec spent 2+ hours daily on calendar management, content planning, meeting prep, and business research — all scattered across different tools.
projects.solution: A personal command center that handles daily planning, content creation, call prep, and business research — all through natural language commands.

projects.title: Automated Proposal Generator
projects.problem: Agency owner was spending 3-4 hours writing each proposal manually after sales calls, delaying deals and losing momentum while clients were still excited.
projects.solution: Client says yes on a call → professional PDF proposal generated in seconds with custom branding, scope, timeline, and pricing. Delivered within minutes, not days.
